title: Positive flow: Create a new account with valid email
preconditions: The app is open and on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Click on the 'NEW ACCOUNT' title | Enter a valid email address into the 'EMAIL' input field | Click on the 'CREATE ACCOUNT' button
expected_result: The app should display a success message indicating the account creation was successful

title: Negative flow: Create a new account with invalid email
preconditions: The app is open and on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Click on the 'NEW ACCOUNT' title | Enter an invalid email address into the 'EMAIL' input field | Click on the 'CREATE ACCOUNT' button
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the email is invalid

title: Negative flow: Create a new account without entering email
preconditions: The app is open and on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Click on the 'NEW ACCOUNT' title | Click on the 'CREATE ACCOUNT' button
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the email is required
